items.title: Drug Manufacturers Help Push US Equity Indexes Higher While Government Shutdown Looms
items.description: US equity indexes rose at the close on Tuesday as gains in healthcare stocks helped offset declines

items.title: Pfizer Stock Soars on Trump’s New Drug Pricing Plan. Here’s Why.
items.description: The president announced a federal government website that allows Pfizer to sell medicines at low prices to cash-paying consumers.

items.title: Repligen, BrightSpring Health Services, Danaher, Thermo Fisher, and Amgen Shares Skyrocket, What You Need To Know
items.description: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after reports revealed a potential drug-pricing agreement between the White House and the pharmaceutical industry.

items.title: Bank of America Securities Maintains a Sell Rating on Amgen (AMGN)
items.description: Amgen Inc. (NASDAQ:AMGN) is one of the best large cap value stocks to buy now.
